news.headline: $BA Musk eyeing options for Boeing to move faster on AF1 jets - NYT
$MSFT Microsoft reveals its first quantum computing chip, the Majorana 1 - CNBC
PrimeLending has won 5 Best-in-Class Lender Awards in 2024 for Loan Originator, Online Tools, Mobile Tools, Pre-Closing Preparedness, Closing Timeframe.
news.summary: PrimeLending, a PlainsCapital Company, based in Dallas, has been acknowledged for its outstanding customer service in the residential mortgage lending sector. The company has received five MortgageCX Best-in-Class Lender Awards for the year 2024 in the Large Independent Lender category. The awards are for Loan Originator, Online Tools, Mobile Tools, Pre-Closing (Preparedness), and Closing Timeframe. PrimeLending has been recognized as a top mortgage lender through feedback from verified borrowers.

news.headline: Baseten secures $75M in funding from IVP and Spark for AI inference, bringing total funding to $135M amidst hypergrowth.
news.summary: Baseten, a prominent AI inference platform, recently disclosed the completion of a significant fundraising round. The Series C round totaled $75 million and was jointly led by IVP and Spark. Other contributors included Greylock, Conviction, South Park Commons, 01 Advisors, and Lachy Groom. This recent development has boosted the company's total funding to $135 million. Baseten's remarkable growth over the past year has established it as the go-to platform for businesses creating AI-driven products. The newly acquired funds will be utilized to support the platform's expansion.

news.headline: Cadence Design Systems' stock drops despite strong Q4, revenue at $1.356 billion (27% YoY growth), record backlog at $6.8 billion. Analysts see upside with price target raised to $328.
news.summary: Cadence Design Systems Inc's shares (NASDAQ:CDNS) saw a decrease despite the company's positive fourth-quarter results. The results were announced during a lively earnings season. Piper Sandler analyst Clarke Jeffries maintained an Overweight rating on the stock and increased the price target from $318 to $328. The company reported fourth-quarter revenues of $1.356 billion, marking a 27% year-on-year growth which surpassed the guidance midpoint. Their non-GAAP operating margins were at 46.0% and earnings stood at $1.88 per share, both exceeding the guidance midpoints. By the end of 2024, Cadence Design Systems had a record backlog of $6.8 billion, attributed to strong performances across all businesses and AI influences on the product portfolio. Although the 2025 revenue guidance of $5.180 billion fell short of the consensus of $5.23 billion, Jeffries speculated that revenue projections could increase throughout the year.

news.headline: Trump criticizes Zelenskiy, broadens Ukraine attacks, calling him a dictator.
QuadReal and T5 Data Centers aim to grow platform to $8.0 billion with recent investment, targeting market opportunities.
news.summary: A recent investment has significantly strengthened T5's ability to take advantage of market opportunities and meet increasing customer needs. The investment was made on February 19, 2025, in New York. QuadReal Property Group (QuadReal), a prominent real estate investment, operating, and development company, partnered with T5 Data Centers (T5). This partnership equips T5 to leverage favorable market conditions and growing customer demand effectively.

news.headline: eero releases new Wi-Fi 7 products, including eero 7 and eero Pro 7, offering faster speeds and better reliability.
news.summary: In Seattle, Amazon shared news regarding its expansion of the eero Wi-Fi product line. This includes the addition of the eero 7, providing multi-gigabit speeds at a lower cost, and the eero Pro 7, which offers high performance for networks requiring extensive bandwidth. These products feature Amazon's TrueMesh, TrueRoam, and TrueChannel networking technologies, along with the latest Wi-Fi 7 functionalities. The eero 7 and Pro 7 aim to enhance Wi-Fi performance, reliability, and reduce latency, ensuring customers remain connected. These new offerings cater to individuals seeking improved connectivity solutions at competitive prices.

news.headline: Share buyback program has finished with all transactions completed. #shares #buyback #completed
Man U's Q2 revenue falls by 12% to £198.70M, US$254.695M; EBITDA forecasts positive for 2025. Trading slightly lower.
news.summary: Shares of Manchester United Ltd. (NYSE: MANU) are experiencing a slight dip in trading today. The company's second-quarter net sales were reported at 198.70 million British Pounds, down from 225.76 million British Pounds compared to the previous year. In United States Dollars, the quarterly sales totalled $254.695 million, surpassing market expectations of $201.220 million. Total revenues saw a 12% decrease in the quarter, mainly attributed to reduced Broadcasting revenues due to the team's involvement in the UEFA Europa League. For a detailed analysis, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Endometriosis Symposium in NYC on March 19 organized by Inspira PT & Winback Group to raise awareness.
news.summary: Inspira Physical Therapy & Pilates, a pelvic floor treatment specialist in New York City, has partnered with the Winback Group to organize the Endometriosis Symposium NYC 2025 in Brooklyn. This event is part of Endometriosis Awareness Month and aims to raise awareness about the condition. The symposium is scheduled to take place on February 19, 2025.

news.headline: Documentary "Learning to Survive: A Lesson in Student Homelessness" reveals rising rates of student homelessness in Las Vegas, premiere in April. Collaboration between Not Wax Productions, Clark County School District's Title I HOPE program. Perspective of impacted children and families shown.
news.summary: In an upcoming collaboration between Not Wax Productions and Clark County School District's Title I HOPE program, a new film project is set to premiere in April. Titled "Learning to Survive: A Lesson in Student Homelessness," the film aims to shed light on the impact of homelessness, showcasing the perspectives of children and families going through this hardship. The premiere of the film is highly anticipated and is expected to draw attention to the pressing issue of student homelessness.

news.headline: Hera Flight receives FAA approval for worldwide Class II operations, marking a significant expansion for the company.
news.summary: A leading private air charter company, Hera Flight, based in Clearwater, Florida, has recently been granted approval by the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) for conducting worldwide Class II operations. This achievement signifies a notable advancement in the company's services, enabling them to offer smooth and effective long-range charter flights across international airspace. The Class II operations certification is a prestigious accolade that allows private jet operations to reach a broader clientele. This approval opens up new opportunities for Hera Flight, as it can now cater to global travelers seeking luxury air travel experiences.

news.headline: White Castle offers $6 Crave & Save Meal, $7.99 Cheesy 10 Sack for savings, Shrimp Nibblers return.
news.summary: White Castle has introduced a new $6 meal deal called Crave & Save, along with a discounted Cheesy 10 Sack priced at $7.99 in selected markets. Shrimp Nibblers have made a return to the menu, enhancing the seafood options that customers enjoy. This was announced in Columbus, Ohio on February 19, 2025.

news.headline: Chase opens 20,000 sq ft Sapphire Lounge at Philadelphia Int'l Airport, featuring Philly-inspired flavors and beer garden.
news.summary: A new Chase Sapphire Lounge by The Club is set to open at Philadelphia International Airport (PHL) on February 20. The 20,000 square-foot lounge, situated between Terminals D and E post-security, aims to provide travelers with an enhanced experience reflecting the city's culture and history. Guests can enjoy locally inspired flavors and a beer garden in this expansive space.

news.headline: Fitch Ratings: We expect the aluminum market to be most affected by US tariffs, as the US relies heavily on imports of primary aluminum for domestic consumption.
Carbon conversion company AIRCO appoints Dr. Sathya Motupally as COO and James Mackey as CFO to expand leadership team.
news.summary: In New York, AIRCO, a carbon conversion technology company, has appointed Dr. Sathya Motupally as Chief Operating Officer (COO) and James Mackey as Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Dr. Motupally, a notable energy expert, will bring his experience in expanding clean energy businesses worldwide to his new role. The company is enthusiastic about these additions to its leadership team as it continues to grow.

news.headline: Fitch Ratings: New US tariffs to fuel commodity market volatility and regional disparities.
BZI presents innovative panelization approach at Advancing Prefabrication Conference, highlighting safety and cost savings.
news.summary: In Kanarraville, Utah, Tom Harker, the Chief Operating Officer (COO) of BZI, discussed advancements at the Advancing Prefabrication 2025 event. Harker highlighted how BZI's innovations are enhancing safety and introducing quicker, cost-effective approaches.

news.headline: Apple introduced iPhone 16e, a more affordable addition to the iPhone 16 lineup. It features A18 chip, Apple C1 modem, and Apple Intelligence™.
news.summary: Apple has revealed the latest addition to its iPhone lineup with the launch of the iPhone 16e in Cupertino, Calif. This new model provides advanced features at a lower cost and is powered by the A18 chip, ensuring swift performance and exceptional battery life. The iPhone 16e also introduces the Apple C1, the company's inaugural cellular modem. Alongside Apple Intelligence™, a smart personal intelligence system offering practical insights and information.

news.headline: Higlobe launches "Higlobe Earn" for Mexicans receiving US salaries- 3% yield on account balance, $100M in annu.
news.summary: In Mexico City, Higlobe, a financial technology company, has announced the launch of "Higlobe Earn" to enhance the income of Mexicans receiving salaries from US-based companies. This new product enables Higlobe customers to earn digital dollars on their account balance. Participants can join at their convenience, and their account balance will yield 3% annually, with no required minimum balance. Higlobe recently exceeded $100 million in assets.

news.headline: Barbie partners with Black in Fashion Council to empower Black female designers for Black History Month. Only 7.3% are Black designers in fashion industry.
news.summary: Mattel, Inc. revealed that Barbie, in light of Black History Month, is honoring Black female designers spanning generations - from the original creator of the first Black Barbie to up-and-coming designers, to aspiring fashion designers. The fashion industry's representation sees Black designers at only 7.3%, despite the community's substantial impact. This initiative serves to recognize and uplift Black women in design and inspire future talents in fashion, acknowledging the importance of diversity and inclusivity in the industry.

news.headline: Jackson Family Wines introduces Passerelles collection from France's Loire Valley. Expands their offerings.
news.summary: In Santa Rosa, California, on February 19, 2025, Jackson Family Wines, a prominent family-owned wine company in the U.S., revealed the debut of Passerelles, their inaugural series of wines from France's esteemed Loire Valley. This new collection signifies a significant expansion for the company, known for its commitment to quality winemaking.

news.headline: S&P Global CEO to present at Raymond James' 46th Annual Institutional Investors Conference on March 3, 2025 in Orlando.
news.summary: A session featuring Martina Cheung, President and CEO of S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI), will be webcasted during Raymond James' 46th Annual Institutional Investors Conference on March 3, 2025, in Orlando, Florida. This event is expected to draw significant attention as industry watchers tune in to hear insights from Ms. Cheung.

news.headline: Acadia Infrastructure Capital adds Oleg Shamovsky as new partner. Shamovsky brings global investment experience to growing team.
news.summary: Acadia Infrastructure Capital recently revealed that Oleg Shamovsky, a seasoned veteran from KKR, is slated to become a Partner at the firm. This addition is part of Acadia's strategy to expand its team with individuals who bring strong expertise in infrastructure investments. With this move, Acadia aims to further strengthen its position in the market.

news.headline: Stag's Leap Wine Cellars buys Arcadia Vineyard in Coombsville AVA from Warren Winiarski; Juan Munoz-Oca involved.
news.summary: In NAPA VALLEY, California on February 19, 2025, Stag's Leap Wine Cellars has obtained the renowned Arcadia Vineyard from Arcadia Vineyards LLC, originally established by the late winemaker Warren Winiarski at the age of 95. The COO of the Antinori family business in the USA, Juan Munoz-Oca, is involved in the acquisition.

news.headline: Montclair Records releases debut album "Dawn" by 17-year-old composer Vonn Vanier through CEN/The Orchard.
news.summary: The debut album "Dawn" by 17-year-old composer Vonn Vanier is being released by Montclair Records in partnership with CEN/The Orchard, a division of Sony Music Entertainment. The album includes seven original compositions.

news.headline: Genesis donates $300,000 to First Tee, Girls on the Run, and U.S. Soccer Foundation at 2025 Genesis Invitational, supporting community recovery efforts.
news.summary: Genesis is demonstrating its support for youth sports by generously donating $100,000 each to three organizations: First Tee, Girls on the Run, and U.S. Soccer Foundation. These donations will also contribute to community recovery efforts in the aftermath of the Southern California wildfires. The announcement was made in San Diego on February 19, 2025.

news.headline: Mitsubishi Logisnext Americas Group reveals UniCarriers® Forklifts' Premier Club winners for 2024 in MARENGO, Ill.
news.summary: In Marengo, Illinois on February 19, 2025, Mitsubishi Logisnext Americas revealed the recipients of the Premier Club Awards for 2024. Mitsubishi Logisnext Americas, the sole manufacturer and supplier of UniCarriers® Forklifts in North, Central, and South America, recognizes top performers through this esteemed program.

news.headline: PFRPA and RxSugar® extend partnership until 2025, offering benefits to retired NFL players.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia on February 19, 2025, the Pro Football Retired Players Association (PFRPA) disclosed its extension of the collaboration with RxSugar® for the year 2025. PFRPA, a prominent national group dedicated to creating initiatives and perks for former NFL athletes, has reaffirmed its connection with RxSugar. The partnership between the two entities was first established when RxSugar joined PFRPA...

news.headline: U.S. airports to face Thanksgiving-level traffic for 50 days in 2027, doubling to 100 days in 2028. Changes needed for FIFA World Cup, Olympics.
news.summary: Predictions suggest that U.S. airports will experience a significant increase in Thanksgiving-like travel patterns, projected to last for 50 days in the coming year and expected to double to 100 days by 2028. The current air travel infrastructure is deemed inadequate to accommodate this surge in passengers. A proposed plan outlines the future of TSA screening procedures, suggesting that travelers will be allowed to keep their shoes and belts on, carry liquids in bottles, and keep laptops in their bags.

news.headline: Bright Uro appoints Chief Medical Officer and adds four urology sales/marketing veterans to drive growth.
news.summary: In a significant development for the medical device industry, a team of urology experts is set to spearhead the growth of Bright Uro, a company based in Irvine, California. This includes a pioneering figure in urodynamics and four seasoned professionals with experience in urology sales and marketing. The company, aiming to revolutionize the treatment of lower urinary tract symptoms (LUTS) through advancements in urodynamics, made this announcement on February 19, 2025. This strategic team is expected to play a key role in driving the expansion and success of Bright Uro in this critical field.

news.headline: Girl Scouts of the USA celebrates National Girl Scout Cookie Weekend on Feb. 21-23, supporting girls through the Cookie Program. #girlscouts #cookies
news.summary: In New York on February 19, 2025, the Girl Scouts of the USA (GSUSA) announced the upcoming National Girl Scout Cookie Weekend from February 21 to 23. This event invites consumers nationwide to participate in celebrating the occasion. During this weekend, individuals from all zip codes will have the opportunity to order and enjoy Girl Scout cookies.

news.headline: AUGA group, AB initiates restructuring for some subsidiaries on Dec 6, 2024 to protect interests of stakeholders and ensure solvency.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, AUGA group, AB revealed the launch of restructuring measures for several subsidiaries. The aim is to safeguard the well-being of employees, creditors, shareholders, and other concerned parties. The primary goals include securing business operations and regaining financial stability in the long run.

news.headline: ATN to announce Q4 & full-year 2024 results on March 4, 2025, with a conference call on March 5, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: A digital infrastructure and communications services provider, ATN International, Inc. ("ATN") (Nasdaq: ATNI) will disclose its fourth quarter and full year 2024 performance on March 4, 2025, after the markets close. This announcement was made on February 19, 2025, in Beverly, Massachusetts. A conference call is set for March 5, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET to delve into these results.

news.headline: The Functionary in FRISCO, Texas earns recognition on CRN's 2024 MSP 500 List, top managed service providers.
news.summary: Utilizing technology-driven managed solutions, we are reshaping global business strategies from Frisco, Texas. The recent inclusion in CRN's 2024 Managed Service Provider 500 List marks a significant achievement for us. This annual ranking highlights the top managed service providers, and our recognition speaks to our commitment to excellence in this field.

news.headline: Aura Bora partners with Next In Natural, Brooklyn-based firm acquiring majority stake - Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, Aura Bora, Inc., known for its craft sparkling waters, revealed that Brooklyn-based investment firm Next In Natural has taken over a majority share in the company. This move sets Aura Bora up for growth and development in the market.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price consolidation likely to end by February with analysts predicting a breakout based on Bollinger Bands.
news.summary: Market analysts anticipate that Bitcoin's current period of price stabilization will come to an end before the end of February. This speculation is supported by the Bollinger Bands indicator, which suggests an upcoming breakout in the cryptocurrency's price movement.

news.headline: Senate Republican Leader Thune: We're planning to proceed with the Senate budget proposal vote.
Aligned's AI Sales Rooms platform earns Top Sales Software spot on G2's 2025 Best Software Awards. #AI #Sales #Aligned
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware on February 19, 2025, Aligned, a leading buyer enablement platform renowned for its AI Sales Rooms revolutionizing sales team productivity, revealed its inclusion in G2's prestigious 2025 Best Software Awards. The company secured a position in the Top Sales Software category and achieved a high ranking.

news.headline: Rochon Genova retained to represent passengers of Delta Airlines Flight 4819 crash in Toronto on Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: Yesterday, Rochon Genova, a Toronto-based law firm, revealed that they have been hired by specific passengers and their families affected by the incident involving the crash of Delta Airlines Flight 4819 at Toronto's Pearson International Airport. The crash, which occurred on February 18, 2025, caused significant harm to individuals, prompting legal action. The law firm will be representing these clients in seeking justice for the damages caused by the unfortunate event.

news.headline: Chris Halbard appointed CEO of EMEA Market at Foundever®, leading operations in 25+ countries for growth and transformation.
news.summary: Foundever®, a prominent player in the customer experience (CX) sector, has revealed Chris Halbard as the new CEO for the EMEA Market. With over 25 countries under his purview, Chris is tasked with ushering in a new era of growth and profitability at Foundever. By focusing on improving performance, enhancing the company's value proposition, and spearheading continuous business transformation, he aims to lead Foundever to greater heights in the EMEA region. Chris will also be instrumental in executing A strategies to fortify the company's position in the market.

news.headline: Enterprises in Brazil are progressing with AI adoption as data analytics capabilities grow, according to ISG.
news.summary: Businesses in Brazil are rapidly embracing artificial intelligence (AI) technologies as their data management and analytics capabilities evolve. According to ISG, enterprises in the region are making substantial progress in leveraging AI to drive innovation and efficiency. The adoption of AI is on the rise, with a growing number of companies implementing AI solutions to enhance their operations. This trend indicates a shift towards more technologically-driven business strategies in Brazil, signaling a promising future for AI integration in various industries.

news.headline: CGX airdrop and prediction market launch on Ronin Network. CGX token now on sidechain with Forkast platform.
news.summary: The CGX token has been officially launched on the Ronin Ethereum sidechain network. This announcement coincides with the introduction of Community Gaming’s latest platform, Forkast prediction markets.

news.headline: CathVision receives CE Mark for ECGenius System in Europe, advancing cardiac monitoring with advanced electrophysiology technology.
news.summary: In Denmark on February 19, 2025, CathVision, a company specializing in advanced electrophysiology solutions, has successfully obtained CE Mark approval for their innovative ECGenius System. This pivotal regulatory achievement permits CathVision to...

news.headline: "Peanut butter invented in 1895 as nutrient source for older adults unable to chew meat, now a vital source of nutrition."
news.summary: In Albany, Georgia, on February 19, 2025, it was revealed that peanut butter, created in 1895 to aid seniors who had difficulty chewing meat, remains essential for good health. This spread assists in delivering crucial nutrients, serving as a valuable nutritional source.

news.headline: First Federal Bank opens 26th branch in Jacksonville, alongside locations in Macclenny, Wildlight, Yulee, and Fernandina.
news.summary: A new branch of First Federal Bank is set to open in Jacksonville, FL, marking the addition of the 26th full-service banking center to the company's portfolio. The new branch will join existing locations in Macclenny, Wildlight, Yulee, and Fernandina. This expansion highlights the company's continued growth and strategic presence in the region.

news.headline: Trump: We are successfully negotiating an end to the Ukraine war.
Trump: Ukraine’s President Zelenskiy better move fast, or won't have a country left.
Prophix named in G2's 2025 Best Software Awards Top 50 list for Accounting and Finance Software.
news.summary: A leading accounting software company, Prophix, has recently been recognized in G2's 2025 Best Software Awards Top 50 list for their exceptional Accounting and Finance Software Products. This prestigious ranking highlights Prophix's position among the top performers in the industry. A testament to their commitment to excellence, this acknowledgment underscores their standing in the accounting software market.
